creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Neil: thank you for catching this.  It appears to have been fixed in the =
most recent version.

I just tried this on a recently updated Bacula Client v 5.2.6:

# pkg_info -L bacula-client-5.2.6=20
Information for bacula-client-5.2.6:

Files:
/usr/local/man/man8/bacula-fd.8.gz
/usr/local/man/man8/bconsole.8.gz
/usr/local/lib/libbac.la
/usr/local/lib/libbac.so
/usr/local/lib/libbac.so.5
/usr/local/lib/libbaccfg.la
/usr/local/lib/libbaccfg.so
/usr/local/lib/libbaccfg.so.5
/usr/local/lib/libbacfind.la
/usr/local/lib/libbacfind.so
/usr/local/lib/libbacfind.so.5
/usr/local/lib/libbacpy.la
/usr/local/lib/libbacpy.so
/usr/local/lib/libbacpy.so.5
/usr/local/lib/bpipe-fd.so
/usr/local/sbin/bacula-fd
/usr/local/sbin/bconsole
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/bacula-fd
/usr/local/etc/bconsole.conf.new
/usr/local/etc/bacula-fd.conf.new
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/VERIFYING
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/technotes
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ChangeLog
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/README
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ReleaseNotes
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/LICENSE
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/INSTALL

[root@ducky ~]#=20


Those directories exist for that port:

ls -l /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/VERIFYING \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/technotes \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ChangeLog \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/README \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ReleaseNotes \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/LICENSE \
> /usr/local/share/doc/bacula/INSTALL
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  146570 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ChangeLog
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    3223 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/INSTALL
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   43233 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/LICENSE
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    1836 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/README
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   39336 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/ReleaseNotes
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    1472 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/VERIFYING
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  146922 Mar  3 19:20 =
/usr/local/share/doc/bacula/technotes
